title: ContactList
description: A contact list in Benchmark Email used for grouping email subscribers.

ID.description: Unique identifier for the contact list.

TotalContacts.description: Total number of contacts in the list.

ActiveContacts.description: Number of active contacts in the list.

CreatedDate.description: Date and time when the list was created.

ModifiedDate.description: Date and time when the list was last modified.
